problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: If Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
